modules_executed: Module 1: Literature Acquisition (15 papers + 3 patents + 5 industry reports)
modules_not_executed: Module 7: Literature Summary (already done in previous run)
data_quality_notes: Paper SRC001 (胡成女等, 2024) provides the most complete experimental data set with 6 precise records from Tables 2-3 and Figure 3
Papers SRC002 (heat-setting) and SRC005 (PET/HTPB) are paywalled — only qualitative trends extracted from abstracts
Paper SRC003 (PET/PGA, Polymer, 2023) has key quantitative results available (90% OTR reduction, >80% transmittance) from abstract
Paper SRC004 (Macromolecules, 2024) has detailed structural data from synchrotron X-ray scattering
